name: get_data_freshness
description:
Report how current the underlying MLS data is before you rely on the other tools.

Returns, per synced resource, the replication cursor (newest listing update seen, whether the initial backfill finished, and when the last full reconcile ran), plus the listing corpus broken down by status, media download coverage, the schema-contract version the data conforms to, and when this snapshot was taken.

Use it to decide whether the dataset is fresh enough to trust for an answer, to explain staleness to the user, or simply to confirm the sync pipeline is alive. Takes no arguments.

contract_version.description: the mlsgrid-sync schema-contract version the data conforms to

cursors.description: replication state per synced resource and MLS feed

backfill_complete.description: whether the initial full import finished

last_reconcile.description: when the last full-feed reconcile completed (RFC3339 UTC); empty if never

resource.description: RESO resource name, e.g. Property or OpenHouse

stored_rows.description: rows of this resource held locally

watermark.description: newest ModificationTimestamp synced (RFC3339 UTC); empty before first sync

data_as_of.description: newest listing modification timestamp (RFC3339 UTC) — how current the data is; empty if unknown

generated_at.description: when this freshness snapshot was produced (RFC3339 UTC)

listing_status_counts.description: listing counts by standard status, most populous first

total_listings.description: total number of property listings stored

name: get_listing
description:
Fetch full detail for one listing by its ListingKey or MLS number.

Prefer listing_key (the cross-MLS unique key, e.g. MRD12345678) — it is unambiguous and is what search_listings returns. mls_number is the human-facing MLS number and is unique only within an originating system, so if the same number exists in more than one feed you must also pass originating_system; otherwise the lookup reports the reference as ambiguous.

Set include_raw to also return the source's scope-filtered extra fields (investment/expense fields, feature arrays, MLS-local keys) as a raw JSON object — useful for details the curated columns do not cover.

Returns list/original/close price (whole US dollars), beds/baths/size/year, address, agent and office, taxes and association fee, photo count and virtual tour, and a data_as_of timestamp. Money is whole dollars; coordinates are often absent.

include_raw.description: also return the scope-filtered raw JSONB extras as a raw object

listing_key.description: MLS Grid cross-MLS unique key (preferred, unambiguous)

mls_number.description: human-facing MLS number; unique only within an originating system

originating_system.description: originating system slug (e.g. mred) to disambiguate mls_number

street_name.description: street name including directional prefix/suffix as delivered

unit_number.description: unit or apartment number, if any

association_fee.description: association/HOA fee in whole US dollars

close_price.description: sale price in whole US dollars; present only for closed listings

data_as_of.description: how current this record is (its modification timestamp, RFC3339 UTC)

latitude.description: latitude; often absent — many MLSs (incl. MRED) omit coordinates

list_price.description: list price in whole US dollars

listing_key.description: MLS Grid cross-MLS unique key, e.g. MRD12345678; use it with get_listing

mls_number.description: human-facing MLS number (ListingId); unique only within an originating system

modification_ts.description: when MLS Grid last modified this record (RFC3339 UTC)

original_list_price.description: original list price in whole US dollars

photos_count.description: number of photos on the listing

property_sub_type.description: RESO PropertySubType, e.g. Single Family Residence, Condominium

property_type.description: RESO PropertyType, e.g. Residential, Residential Income

raw.description: scope-filtered raw extras; present only when include_raw is set

standard_status.description: RESO StandardStatus, e.g. Active, Closed, Pending

tax_annual_amount.description: annual property tax in whole US dollars

tax_year.description: tax year the amount applies to

virtual_tour_url.description: unbranded virtual tour URL, if any

name: search_listings
description:
Search the MLS listing corpus by area, status, type, price, size, and free text.

Use this to find candidate properties before drilling into one with get_listing. All filters are optional and AND together; omit a filter to leave that dimension unconstrained. Money is in whole US dollars. Results are ordered newest-updated first.

Notes for accurate use:
- Area: set at most one of city / postal_code / county (state narrows further). Matching is case-insensitive and exact — pass "Chicago", not "chicago area".
- statuses / property_types accept several values (OR within a field); a property_types value matches either PropertyType or PropertySubType.
- keywords is a best-effort substring match over remarks and address (no full-text index), so it is a filter of last resort, not a semantic search.
- Coordinates (latitude/longitude) are frequently absent — many MLSs, including MRED, omit them.
- Paginate with the returned next_cursor (pass it back as cursor); an empty next_cursor means the last page. No grand total is returned — page through instead.

Personas: buyers/investors filter by area+price+beds; agents pull recent activity in a market; analysts sweep a status/type across a county.

city.description: city to search within (case-insensitive exact match)

county.description: county or parish to search within

cursor.description: opaque pagination cursor from a prior result's next_cursor

keywords.description: best-effort substring match over remarks and address

limit.description: maximum results to return (default 25, capped at 100)

max_living_area.description: maximum living area in square feet

max_price.description: maximum list price in whole US dollars

min_living_area.description: minimum living area in square feet

min_price.description: minimum list price in whole US dollars

property_types.description: PropertyType or PropertySubType values to include; empty means any

state.description: two-letter state or province to narrow the area

statuses.description: RESO StandardStatus values to include, e.g. ["Active","Pending"]; empty means any

count.description: number of listings on this page

data_as_of.description: how current the underlying data is (newest record timestamp, RFC3339 UTC)

street_name.description: street name including directional prefix/suffix as delivered

unit_number.description: unit or apartment number, if any

close_price.description: sale price in whole US dollars; present only for closed listings

latitude.description: latitude; often absent — many MLSs (incl. MRED) omit coordinates

list_price.description: list price in whole US dollars

listing_key.description: MLS Grid cross-MLS unique key, e.g. MRD12345678; use it with get_listing

mls_number.description: human-facing MLS number (ListingId); unique only within an originating system

modification_ts.description: when MLS Grid last modified this record (RFC3339 UTC)

property_sub_type.description: RESO PropertySubType, e.g. Single Family Residence, Condominium

property_type.description: RESO PropertyType, e.g. Residential, Residential Income

standard_status.description: RESO StandardStatus, e.g. Active, Closed, Pending

next_cursor.description: pass back as cursor to fetch the next page; empty on the last page
